subcodes.first_line: O kind friends of 'Abdu'l-Bahá, your letter was received with utmost sorrow, regret and grief [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران مهربان عبدالبهاء نامه شما رسید و در نهایت تاثر و حسرت و حزن و اندوه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for strength, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @spiritual transformation, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @past, present and future of Iran, @prayer for spiritual recognition
